title: BEM-550.7 cleanup manifest
objective:
Run script:
"""
archive=Path('governance/archive/bem550_cleanup'); archive.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
candidates=[]
for root in ['governance/internal_contour/tests','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs']:
    p=Path(root)
    if p.exists():
        for child in p.iterdir():
            name=str(child)
            if any(tag in name for tag in ['bem540','bem541','bem542','bem543','bem544']):
                candidates.append(name)
manifest={'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:39 (UTC+3)','policy':'manifest first, no delete during autonomous cleanup','candidates':candidates,'action':'archive_manifest_only','reason':'preserve proof chain and avoid breaking system'}
manifest_path=archive/'cleanup_manifest.json'
manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(manifest,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
record={'record_type':'repository_cleanup_manifest','cycle_id':'bem550-7-cleanup','source':'gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(manifest_path),'candidates_count':len(candidates),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:39 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
cs={}
if contour.exists():
    try: cs=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: cs={}
cs['bem550_7_repository_cleanup']={'status':'PASS','manifest':str(manifest_path),'candidates_count':len(candidates),'blocker':None}; cs['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 15:39 (UTC+3)'; cs['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(cs,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
report=reports/'bem550_7_repository_cleanup_manifest.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-550.7 | Repository Cleanup/Archive Manifest | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:39 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nCleanup manifest created. No unsafe delete performed during autonomous run.\n\n## Candidates count\n'+str(len(candidates))+'\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof=proofs/'bem550_7_repository_cleanup_manifest.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-550.7 PASS: cleanup manifest created, candidates='+str(len(candidates))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(manifest_path),str(transport),str(contour),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-550.7 cleanup/archive manifest completed')
